summary: Project involves a service/repair management system with work order functionality, cashier page, and inventory page. User reported that the work order button is broken after Version 19 deployment and wants the cashier and inventory pages reverted to Draft Version 15.
architectural_notes: Work order button must function correctly when clicked (broken in Version 19)
Cashier and inventory pages should match Draft Version 15 as baseline
known_issues: Work order button not functioning when clicked (regression in Version 19)
Cashier page and inventory page need to be reverted to Draft Version 15 state

existing_features.title: Fix the Work Order button on the Service page (ServicePage.tsx) so that clicking it correctly opens the work order detail or completion dialog. The button must be fully functional and respond to click events without errors.

Revert CashierPage.tsx to its Draft Version 15 implementation. Remove any changes introduced in Version 16 through Version 19 that altered the cashier page's UI, logic, or behavior, restoring it to the stable Version 15 state.

Revert InventoryPage.tsx to its Draft Version 15 implementation. Remove any changes introduced in Version 16 through Version 19 that altered the inventory page's UI, logic, or behavior, restoring it to the stable Version 15 state.
